sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The Toronto Maple Leafs are one of the Original Six NHL franchises, founded in 1917 and based in Toronto, Ontario, Canada. They play at Scotiabank Arena and compete in the Atlantic Division of the Eastern Conference. The Maple Leafs are the most valuable franchise in the NHL and one of the most globally recognized hockey brands, with a passionate fanbase that spans Canada and beyond.
